meta.title: Antoniuos Samy Aziz | Software Tester
meta.description: QA Engineer specializing in manual testing, automation with Selenium, and API testing. Cairo, Egypt.

about.bio: Quality Assurance Engineer dedicated to bridging the gap between manual precision and automated efficiency. My journey started with a simple question: What if this breaks? I combine manual testing expertise with robust Selenium automation to ensure reliable, high-quality software that users can trust.
focus: Engineering-driven QA with Java and Selenium automation
Comprehensive API testing and database validation
Root cause analysis and defect lifecycle management
Agile team collaboration for continuous software improvement

experience.title: Freelance Software Tester
experience.description: Executing functional and regression tests across various web and mobile applications. Documenting high-quality bug reports with clear reproduction steps, screenshots, and crash logs. Collaborating with QA leads and onboarding managers to refine testing strategies and ensure adherence to professional testing standards.
achievements: Identified and documented critical defects in production environments
Created comprehensive bug reports that reduced developer resolution time by 30%
Maintained 95%+ accuracy in test case execution and defect reporting

experience.title: Junior Software Tester
experience.description: Designing and executing manual and automated test cases using Java and Selenium to ensure software reliability. Performing functional, regression, and API testing to validate system behavior and endpoint accuracy. Tracking and managing software defects using JIRA with clear documentation.
achievements: Designed 50+ comprehensive test cases across multiple modules
Automated critical user workflows with Selenium, reducing regression testing time by 40%
Collaborated within Agile teams following SCRUM ceremonies for continuous improvement

experience.title: Automation Testing Practice
experience.description: Dedicated personal projects to build expertise in test automation. Built automated test scripts using Selenium to validate web application workflows and practiced API testing to verify endpoints, status codes, and responses.
achievements: Created reusable test automation frameworks reducing manual effort
Achieved 80%+ test coverage for sample applications
Developed expertise in Selenium WebDriver, Page Object Model patterns, and CI/CD integration
